omopColumns.name: nhs_number
omopColumns.query:
select
			distinct
				ae.GeneratedRecordIdentifier,
				ae.NHSNumber,
				ae.CDSActivityDate as PrimaryProcedureDate,
				p.AccidentAndEmergencyTreatment as PrimaryProcedure
		from omop_staging.sus_AE ae
			inner join omop_staging.sus_AE_treatment p
				on AE.MessageId = p.MessageId
		where NHSNumber is not null
		order by
			ae.GeneratedRecordIdentifier,
			ae.NHSNumber,
			ae.CDSActivityDate,
			p.AccidentAndEmergencyTreatment

omopColumns.name: procedure_type_concept_id
omopColumns.operation_description: Constant value set to `32818`. `EHR Administration record`

omopColumns.name: procedure_source_value

dataSource.name: PrimaryProcedure
dataSource.description:
ACCIDENT AND EMERGENCY TREATMENT is a six character code, comprising:
				Condition	n2 (see Treatment Table below)
				Sub-Analysis	n1 (see Sub-analysis Table below)
				Local use	up to an3

omopColumns.query:
select
			distinct
				ae.GeneratedRecordIdentifier,
				ae.NHSNumber,
				ae.CDSActivityDate as PrimaryProcedureDate,
				p.AccidentAndEmergencyTreatment as PrimaryProcedure
		from omop_staging.sus_AE ae
			inner join omop_staging.sus_AE_treatment p
				on AE.MessageId = p.MessageId
		where NHSNumber is not null
		order by
			ae.GeneratedRecordIdentifier,
			ae.NHSNumber,
			ae.CDSActivityDate,
			p.AccidentAndEmergencyTreatment

omopColumns.name: RecordConnectionIdentifier

dataSource.name: GeneratedRecordIdentifier
dataSource.description: CDS specific identifier that binds multiple CDS messages together.

omopColumns.query:
select
			distinct
				ae.GeneratedRecordIdentifier,
				ae.NHSNumber,
				ae.CDSActivityDate as PrimaryProcedureDate,
				p.AccidentAndEmergencyTreatment as PrimaryProcedure
		from omop_staging.sus_AE ae
			inner join omop_staging.sus_AE_treatment p
				on AE.MessageId = p.MessageId
		where NHSNumber is not null
		order by
			ae.GeneratedRecordIdentifier,
			ae.NHSNumber,
			ae.CDSActivityDate,
			p.AccidentAndEmergencyTreatment
